afterSwap(address,(address,address,uint2.details: Calculates the UBI share of the output token and routes it to the UBI pool.      In a real V4 integration, this modifies the delta. Here we simulate by      expecting the fee tokens to be sent to this contract before calling.

params.amount: The total amount to calculate fee from

returns._0: ubiShare The amount that goes to UBI

params._poolManager: Address of the Uniswap V4 PoolManager
params._ubiFeeShareBPS: Fee share in basis points (e.g., 3333 for 33.33%)
params._ubiPool: Address of the UBI pool to receive fees

params.newBPS: New fee share in basis points

afterSwap(address,(address,address,uint2.notice: Called by PoolManager after a swap completes.

calculateUBIFee(uint256).notice: Calculate the UBI fee for a given amount

getUBIFeesForToken(address).notice: Get total UBI fees collected for a token

poolManager().notice: The pool manager this hook is registered with

rescueTokens(address,address,uint256).notice: Rescue tokens accidentally sent to this contract

setUBIFeeShare(uint256).notice: Update the UBI fee share percentage

totalUBIFees(address).notice: Total fees routed to UBI (per token)

ubiFeeShareBPS().notice: Fee percentage routed to UBI in basis points (3333 = 33.33%)

ubiPool().notice: The UBI pool that receives fee share
